# Pull Request

This repo is for bug tracking and public issue intake. 

If you're submitting a pull request here, thank you for helping! But please note: this is the public issue tracker, not the main development repository.

**Before submitting, please:**
1. Check if your contribution is about the bug tracker documentation/forms
2. For mod code changes, please submit to the individual mod repositories instead

## What's this PR about?

- [ ] Bug tracker documentation update
- [ ] Issue form improvement
- [ ] Label taxonomy change
- [ ] Workflow documentation update
- [ ] Other (explain below)

## Description

Explain what you're improving and why.

## Changes

List the specific changes (files updated, sections added, etc.)

---

**For maintainers:** Verify that any changes to labels or forms are reflected in all relevant locations (forms, taxonomy docs, triage guide).
